original.query: I’m about to jump into a pretty heated public-topic debate with someone close to me, but I’m trying to avoid a repeat of what’s happened before. Based on my personal history, what category of conversation should I steer away from so things don’t blow up at home?

```json
  "answer": "Based on your personal history, you should steer away from political discussions. These conversations have caused conflicts with your family in the past, so avoiding political topics will help prevent things from blowing up at home again.",
  "reason": "Memory m1 explicitly states 'Political discussions cause conflicts with family' and is labeled as a sensitive topic/constraint. This directly answers the query about what category of conversation has historically caused problems at home and should be avoided.",
  "selected_memory_id": "m1"
}
```
